files.notes: This file contains a single comprehensive article covering the Relief Society Conference proceedings, including multiple speakers and sessions (Opening Session, Officers' Meeting, and various presentations). Despite its length and multiple speakers, it represents one cohesive conference report rather than separate articles. The content flows continuously from the opening remarks through various presentations to the closing discussion on unemployment insurance.
